title: System Information
html:
System Information

Contents

  • Kernel / distro
  • CPU / memory
  • Processes
  • Hardware
  • Logs / boot

Kernel / distro

CommandDescription
 
uname -a
everything
uname -r
kernel release
hostnamectl
hostname, OS, kernel, virt info
cat /etc/os-release
distro details
lsb_release -a
distro (if installed)
cat /proc/version
kernel compile info
uptime -p
pretty uptime

CPU / memory

CommandDescription
 
lscpu
CPU topology
cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -c ^processor
logical core count
nproc
logical core count (shorter)
free -h
RAM + swap
cat /proc/meminfo | head
detailed memory stats
vmstat 1 5
5 samples of system stats

Processes

CommandDescription
 
ps -ef
all processes, full format
ps auxf
with parent tree
ps -eo pid,ppid,pcpu,pmem,cmd --sort=-pcpu | head
top CPU consumers
pgrep -af nginx
PIDs matching pattern + cmdline
pidof sshd
PID of process by name
top
live process viewer
htop
better top (color, scroll, kill)
iotop
live I/O per process
kill -9 1234
force kill PID
pkill -f gunicorn
kill by cmdline match
killall firefox
kill by exact name

Hardware

CommandDescription
 
lspci
PCI devices
lsusb
USB devices
lshw -short
hardware overview
dmidecode -t bios
BIOS / DMI tables (needs root)
sensors
temp / fan (lm-sensors)
inxi -Fxz
pretty hardware report

Logs / boot

CommandDescription
 
journalctl -xe
recent system journal
journalctl -u nginx -f
follow one unit
journalctl --since '1 hour ago'
time-bounded
journalctl -k -b
kernel msgs since this boot
dmesg -T | tail
kernel ring buffer, human times
last
login history
lastb
failed logins (needs root)
excerpt: System Information Contents Kernel / distro CPU / memory Processes Hardware Logs / boot Kernel / distro Command Description uname -a everything uname -r kernel release hostnamectl hostname, OS, kernel, virt info cat /etc/os-release distro details lsb_release -a distro (if installed) cat /proc/version kernel compile info uptime -p pretty uptime CPU / memory Command Description lscpu CPU topology cat /proc/cpuinfo | grep -c ^processor logical core count nproc logical core count (shorter) free -h RAM + swap cat /proc/meminfo | head detailed memory stats vmstat 1 5 5 samples of system stats Processes Command Description ps -ef all processes, full format ps auxf with parent tree ps -eo pid,ppid,pcpu,pmem,cmd --sort=-pcpu | head top CPU consumers pgrep -af nginx PIDs matching pattern + cmdline pidof sshd PID of process by name top live process viewer htop better top (color, scroll, kill) iotop live I/O per process kill -9 1234 force kill PID pkill -f gunicorn kill by cmdline match killall firefox kill by exact name Hardware Command Description lspci PCI devices lsusb USB devices lshw -short hardware overview dmidecode -t bios BIOS / DMI tables (needs root) sensors temp / fan (lm-sensors) inxi -Fxz pretty hardware report Logs / boot Command Description journalctl -xe recent system journal journalctl -u nginx -f follow one unit journalctl --since '1 hour ago' time-bounded journalctl -k -b kernel msgs since this boot dmesg -T | tail kernel ring buffer, human times last login history lastb failed logins (needs root)
